scope: Limgrave + Weeping Peninsula, pre-Margit accessible weapons only. Excludes shields/staves/seals/armor.
notes: Morning Star is Weeping Peninsula (south of Bridge of Sacrifice), NOT Limgrave — common misattribution
Stormveil Castle weapons excluded (post-Margit): Misericorde, Caestus, Highland Axe, Brick Hammer, Hookclaws, Pike, Torchpole, Omen Cleaver, Warhawk's Talon, Crescent Moon Axe
Forked Greatsword excluded — actually in Road's End / Minor Erdtree Catacombs
Golem Greatbow/Halberd flagged ambiguous (Limgrave Tower Bridge farm, arguable pre/post Margit)
